name: Detail Panel
description: Full detail view for a single entity with a header section and tabbed content areas. Used for user profiles, product details, and record views.

slots.header: Entity header with Avatar, title (_heading3), subtitle (_caption), status Badge, and action Buttons via _flex _gap3 _itemsCenter. Wrapped in Card.Header
slots.tabs: Tabs component with content panels. Common tabs: Overview, Details, Activity, Settings
slots.tab-content: Each tab panel contains domain-specific content using Cards, form fields, or activity-feed pattern
